code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let data = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(data)
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut last: Int = -1
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(data, i)
    when Some(b)
      last = b
      if b == 10
        count = count + 1
      end
    when None
      last = last
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if n > 0 and last != 10
    count = count + 1
  end
  print("lines=#{count}")
end
